chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Transfer Application No.S-28 & 30 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 22.08.2022 Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, advocate for private respondents. Mr. Shawak Rathore, D.P.G...... Injured Zubair Hussain, nephew of applicant/complainant is present, who by means of this application, is seeking transfer of criminal case No.247/2019 (Re-Ghulam Qadir & others v/s The State) emanating from Crime No.42/2019, u/s 324, 506/2, 337-H(ii), 147, 148, 149, 504 PPC registered at P.S Pero Mal, from Assistant Sessions Judge-1,Sanghar to any other Additional Sessions Judge Sanghar on the ground that he has no faith on him. Previous to this, he filed application before Sessions Judge Sanghar, which has been dismissed on the grounds appearing to be sound and sustainable. No material is available to disagree with the opinion of learned Sessions Judge. The case is fixed for final judgments and main grievance of the applicant / complainant appears to be the non-arrest of main accused, an issue, different from the present one, hence, cannot be entertained in these proceedings. Accordingly, Criminal Transfer Application No.S-28 of 2022 and restoration application (M.A. 2954/2022) in Criminal Transfer Application No.S-30 of 2021 are dismissed. JUDGE
